posts.author: MRC-Fridays-1960 (Michael Richter)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, is it possible to remove the Share capability for a View? If a user uses this function to share a link, then anyone has access publicly to the link and we want to avoid anyone sending this out since we are limiting our use to internal users. When I add a new View (e.g. Table), the default always has the sharing link. Does this mean all users will have default to share a link publicly? Thanks!
